actions.rationale: The Start button is the bright green primary control near the centre of the screen; move the pointer to it and left-click to launch.

notes: MOVE.dx/dy are interpreted as absolute screen pixel coordinates for fixture v0. The button rect is (315,240)-(485,320) in image.jpg, so any dx in [315,485] and dy in [240,320] should be considered correct in a tolerant grader.
